posts.text:
Everyone thinks they’re right. @malcolmgladwell thinks that might be the problem.

This week we talk trans athletes, media narratives, Disney, and why some arguments can’t actually be “won.”

Watch the full episode on YouTube or listen wherever you get your podcasts.

posts.text:
AI might already be deciding whether you get hired.
 
Not a human. Not a manager. Not even someone reading your resume.
 
We sat down with investigative journalist Hilke Schellmann to break down how companies are using AI to screen applications, analyze video interviews, track productivity, and even predict who might quit.
 
If you’ve applied for a job in the last five years… this episode is for you.
 
Watch now.

posts.text:
How do smart, educated people end up in cults?

And before you say, “That could never be me”… that’s exactly what most people inside a cult once said too.

On this week’s @whatnowpodcast, we sit down with cult expert and former Moonie Dr. Steven Hassan @cultexpert to unpack how recruitment really works, how identity gets rebuilt, and why mind control doesn’t look like mind control when you’re living inside it.

Full episode on YouTube or wherever you get your podcasts.

posts.text:
Everyone thinks the future is going to destroy us.
 
AI will replace you.
Technology will ruin society.
Aliens are probably hostile.
 
But what if the real problem is that we’ve trained ourselves to expect disaster?
 
On this week’s @whatnowpodcast we sit down with @cleoabram to talk about why optimism feels radical right now, and why imagination might be the most important technology we have.
 
Watch on YouTube or listen wherever you get your podcasts.
